PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-03-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Lew for and with (petitioner) Dao Chung.

The court stated that no objections have been filed. The Court granted the petition for letters of administration (subject to review of the order) and sets a status date of April 6, 2015 for filing of the Inventory and Appraisal and bond.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy McConoco. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-10-2014 Continued To Sep-29-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Yen Zhou in Propria Persona.

This was a pre-granted matter. Ms. Zhou stated that she wants the Public Administrator appointed because she feels the Uncle will not look out for her Children's best interest. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to September 29, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Zhou to file her objection.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
